issues.title: Nested loops detected
issues.description: The function 'bad_function' contains nested loops with a maximum depth of 3.
issues.impact: Deeply nested loops increase time complexity and reduce code readability and maintainability.
issues.suggestion: Consider refactoring nested loops using helper functions, early exits, or alternative algorithms.

issues.title: Too many function parameters
issues.impact: Functions with many parameters are harder to understand and maintain.
issues.suggestion: Consider grouping parameters into objects or splitting the function.
